title: q_template veto on S03/S04-style pair-residual resolution tail tables

ml.method: RandomForest q_template veto score on S03b pair residual tails

conclusion: The pair-level q_template veto does not produce a statistically secure residual-tail improvement. S03b no-veto sigma68 is 1.645 ns; traditional q-veto delta is 0.079 ns [0.046, 0.228], and ML q-veto delta is -0.065 ns [-0.073, 0.097]. Leakage flags: 0.
follow_up_tickets: S04e: apply q_template vetoes to B2-containing full timing-resolution tail tables
P02f: learned shape-atom veto scores versus q_template for pair-level timing tails
